details.test: Task 1: Get 5kW residential quote under $120/month and save it
Task 2: Select 6-8kW residential package under $15k with 20y warranty and add to quote
Task 3: Book earliest weekday 10:00 AM virtual consultation for ZIP 78704
Task 4: Save most recent federal solar tax credit article from last 12 months
Task 5: Create savings scenario with >= $1,500 estimated annual savings and save it
Task 6: Contact top-rated installer within 25 miles of 30301 with 4.5+ stars and 50+ reviews
Task 7: Design residential system with 16x400W panels and >=10 kWh battery, view summary, save quote
Task 8: Choose financing option (<$3k upfront, <$150/month, lowest APR) and save pre-application
